name: 30 — AI Memory Daily Digest (09:05 Kyiv → Telegram #digest)

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_memories WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS total_24h,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ai_memories WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS active_users_24h,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LENGTH(content)), 0) FROM ai_memories WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS total_chars_24h,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_memories WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS total_7d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_memories) AS lifetime_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ai_memories) AS lifetime_users,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(s ORDER BY s.cnt DESC)
       FROM (
         SELECT
           source,
           COUNT(*)::int AS cnt,
           COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)::int AS users
         FROM ai_memories
         WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
         GROUP BY source
       ) s
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS by_source

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={"inline_keyboard":[[{"text":"✅ Прочитав","callback_data":"ack:r:{{ $('Build alert payload (ai-memory-digest)').item.json.alertId }}"},{"text":"🔄 Розбираю","callback_data":"ack:i:{{ $('Build alert payload (ai-memory-digest)').item.json.alertId }}"},{"text":"🔕 Замутити 30хв","callback_data":"ack:m:{{ $('Build alert payload (ai-memory-digest)').item.json.alertId }}"}]]}
